title: Bloom Energy Was on Fire in 2025 -- and the Real Life-Changing Growth May Still Be Ahead
text: Bloom Energy demonstrated exceptional performance throughout 2025, establishing itself as a critical infrastructure provider for AI data centers. The company's fuel cell technology provides clean, reliable, and scalable power solutions meeting the unprecedented demands of artificial intelligence infrastructure buildout. Full-year 2025 results showed record revenue with significant margin expansion. The company's strategic positioning as the go-to power provider for AI creates a long-term growth runway. Management's confidence is reflected in raised guidance and expansion of manufacturing capacity. The $5 billion Brookfield partnership and multi-gigawatt Oracle commitment provide visibility into near-term revenue and validate the AI data center thesis. CEO KR Sridhar emphasizes Bloom's mission-driven approach and disciplined execution strategy. The company's ability to deploy power infrastructure in 90 days versus traditional utility infrastructure taking 4-8 years represents a critical competitive advantage in the rapidly expanding AI data center market. While current valuation appears premium by historical standards, long-term growth potential from AI infrastructure expansion justifies consideration by growth-oriented investors with appropriate risk tolerance.
